name: bpmct
css: .bpmct-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #1a0a00; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .bpmct-text { font-family: 'Georgia', serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 10vw, 5rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6a00 0%, #ff9a00 30%, #ffcc00 55%, #ff7a00 80%, #ff4500 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px #ff6a00) drop-shadow(0 0 40px #ff4500); animation: bpmct-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes bpmct-pulse { 0%, 100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px #ff6a00) drop-shadow(0 0 40px #ff4500); } 50% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 32px #ffaa00) drop-shadow(0 0 70px #ff6a00); } }
